disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe deep bilateral thigh and lower-back bone pain rated 10/10, onset over 6 hours in a person with known sickle cell disease
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and how bad is it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep crushing pain in both my thigh bones and my lower back, ten out of ten, like they're being squeezed in a vice. This is one of my sickle cell pain crises.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is completely refractory to maximum home oral opioid (oxycodone) plus paracetamol taken over the last 6 hours
trigger_question_examples: What have you already taken for it?
Did your usual painkillers help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken all my usual strong tablets — the oxycodone and paracetamol, the maximum for the day — over the last few hours and they've done absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden worsening of baseline exhaustion tonight on top of chronic fatigue and pallor
trigger_question_examples: How is your energy compared with normal?
Do you feel more drained than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm always tired and pale from the sickle cell, but tonight I feel suddenly much more wiped out and drained than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cold exposure earlier today preceded the rapid escalation of pain
trigger_question_examples: Did anything seem to set this off?
Were you cold or unwell beforehand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I got a bit cold earlier today and the pain really took off after that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Yellowing of the eyes and skin (jaundice) and marked pallor, self-observed
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of your eyes or skin?
Do your eyes or skin ever look yellow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The whites of my eyes and my skin have gone yellow, like they do sometimes, and I look really pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no shortness of breath, no cough and no high fever at present (acute chest syndrome screen negative now)
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, cough or trouble breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my chest feels okay, I'm not short of breath and I don't have a cough or a high fever right now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nausea with risk of poor oral intake and dehydration
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep fluids down?
Do you feel sick or nauseous?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit sick in the stomach and I'm not drinking much because of it.

trigger_question_examples: Have you had any operations, like having your spleen removed?
Do you still have your spleen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've had my spleen taken out.
